results.title: Best-selling keyboard switches of May 2026
results.content:
Pic: TTC X Pantheonkeys PT Black

TTC X Pantheonkeys PT Black

 And Akko is launching a new, upgraded series of their switches. The first specimen is the Yellow U1 (EU site, US site). I wouldn't call this an upgrade, it's apparently an entirely new model. New shape, new diffuser, using a new POM blend and landing somewhere between the clackier V3 and the thockier V5 in terms of sound.

Pic: 

 Keebz N Cables is about to release their first switch under the F-ROW Brand utilizing their own custom tooling: Hollow Tip. A zero pre-travel heavy tactile manufactured by BSUN. Inspired by the physics of a cupped clap, less surface area, bigger impact. The Hollow Tip stem makes contact only at the circumference of the tip, increasing impact force on bottom-out. The result: a loud, punchy sound. [...] Pic: Switch testers

Switch testers

## Novelties & Database updates

Jeez… 26 switch models have recently been added to the database as a result of the incoming top lists. However, the majority of these are rather old. I'll have to ask the shops to simply skip such entries, especially if, after a clearance sale, the switch is not even available anymore.

Anyway, here are some switch news for ya':

 I got my dirty paws on a set of TTC x PT Blacks. Wow, this switch has a strong character. Mostly for people who enjoy the recent trend of intentionally scratchy switches, definitely not for fans of the silky-smooth typing experience. Even the housing feels rawer, edgier, and sharper – true to its inspiration of the classic Cherry Black. All in all, these are switches for the hardcore crowd. [...] Akko Cream Yellow Pro V5 switch

> We're about to launch a new upgraded series of our switches! – Albert.

results.title: AI News Week 20 (May 11 – May 17, 2026)
results.content:
Image 11: Article content

Paper: 

  

SENSENOVA RELEASES U1 UNIFIED MULTIMODAL MODEL

SenseNova introduced SenseNova-U1 last week, an open-source multimodal model that natively unified text and image understanding and generation. The research team built the system to process raw pixels and text through a single end-to-end architecture. [...] 🔓 Frontier Models and Open Source

   Qwen-Image-2.0: A new foundation model that unifies high-fidelity generation and precise image editing, ranking #1 among Chinese models.
   SenseNova-U1: A breakthrough open-source model that discards vision encoders entirely, processing raw pixels and text through a single architecture.
   Jina-Embeddings-v5-Omni: A modular model that adds image and video search to existing text pipelines using only 0.35% new weights.

🧪 The Research Frontier [...] 💻 Mobile and Consumer AI

   Gemini for Android: Google launched "vibe-coded" widgets, allowing users to build custom dashboards on their home screens using simple natural language prompts.
   Alexa for Shopping: Amazon officially replaced Rufus with a new Alexa assistant that can autonomously shop on third-party websites outside of Amazon.
   Google's Rambler: A new AI dictation tool for Gboard that removes stutters and filler words in real-time while supporting multilingual code-switching.

🔓 Frontier Models and Open Source

results.title: WWDC 2026 | Post-Event Megathread : r/apple - Reddit
results.content:
### Release Strategy

   Staggered Launches: The iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max are expected to launch in Fall 2026, while the standard iPhone 18, 18e, and iPhone Air 2 may be delayed until Spring 2027. "Apple is not expected to ship the ‌iPhone 18‌ in 2026. Instead, reports indicate that Apple plans to launch the ‌iPhone 18‌ Pro, ‌iPhone 18‌ Pro Max, and foldable ‌iPhone‌ in the usual fall timeframe, while holding the standard ‌iPhone 18‌ back until the spring of 2027, where it will launch alongside the ‌iPhone‌ 18e and iPhone Air 2." [...] Performance Upgrade: Expect an A20 Pro chip, built on TSMC's 2nm process, offering increased speed and efficiency. "A20 Pro chip – TSMC’s first 2nm process. Performance bump, sure."

   Display and Battery: The Pro Max may be slightly thicker to accommodate a larger battery, and LTPO+ displays are anticipated for better battery life across models. "Slightly Thicker iPhone 18 Pro Max — Marginally thicker body to accommodate a larger battery"

### Design and Aesthetics

   Subtle Changes: Expect no significant design overhaul for the standard iPhone 18, with some anticipating a more substantial redesign for a future anniversary model. "No Big Design Changes Planned for iPhone 18, Report Says" [...] Continue with Email 

 Continue with Phone Number 

By continuing, you agree to ourUser Agreementand acknowledge that you understand thePrivacy Policy. 

# People also ask about section

 People also ask about 

 Latest rumors about the next iPhone 

The next iPhone is rumored to bring incremental improvements rather than a major redesign, with a potential staggered release for different models and a focus on the iPhone Fold.

### Expected Features

   Camera Enhancements: The main 48MP Fusion camera is rumored to get a variable aperture for improved light control, primarily benefiting pro video users. "Variable aperture is almost a non feature for Photography It's for Pro Video"

results.title: Physical AI Is Already Here. But What Is It?
results.content:
An illustration depicts a person going through phases of different emotional states along with different weather patterns.

## Can AI help predict how you might be feeling in the future?

A yellow Spirit Airlines plane in the air against a hazy orange sky background.

## Spirit gone, airfares high. Is now a good time to fly?

# Physical AI is already here. But what is it?

© 2026 Northeastern University [...] ## Science & Technology

President Donald Trump walks in the Rose Garden at the White House.

## Why is the government considering new rules on AI safety? Experts weigh in

From the ground, SpaceX's Starship rocket 38 launches during the 11th test flight on October 13, 2025 as seen from South Padre Island in Texas. The background is a blue sky with no clouds, as the rocket leaves behind contrails.

## A SpaceX rocket will soon hit the moon. Should you be worried?

A computer screen displaying two AI-generated goblin images in the ChatGPT interface.

## ChatGPT has a goblin problem. It’s bigger than an AI quirk.

## Recent Stories

A nurse dressed in PPE stands next to a person washing their hands while wearing a mask.

## Ebola can be contained, but the effort is just “ramping up” [...] China’s dancing robot seemed harmless enough. But in other contexts, such systems could

“How can we make sure that this action is safe, trustworthy, verifiable and something that is robust?” Ostadabbas said. “That is the final pillar in our framework.”

Wang thinks it may soon be implemented at scale, provided innovation and development continue at its current pace.

“I think it will become more mainstream, but it is still a far way to go,” Wang said. “But … based on the current progress of this generation of tools, maybe after two or three years there will be a big breakthrough.”

Tanner Stening is an assistant news editor at Northeastern Global News. Email him at t.stening@northeastern.edu. Follow him on X/Twitter @tstening90.

## Science & Technology

results.title: Second Century Ventures Announces 6 Technology Companies for ...
results.content:
Companies selected for the 2026 REACH program include: [...] CHICAGO (May 28, 2026) – Second Century Ventures, the strategic investment arm of the National Association of REALTORS® and the most active global real estate technology fund, today announced the six companies selected for the 2026 NAR REACH program.

For more than a decade, REACH has vetted, selected and accelerated unique technology solutions focused on the U.S. residential real estate sector. This significantly helps real estate agents get to their next transaction, consumers unlock their American Dream and the economy grow. Since 2019, REACH has expanded to include programs serving the commercial sector and global markets, collectively accelerating more than 375 new technologies worldwide. [...] - Global
